creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
I am seeing this on a 7.2 release while plugging in my palm pre when
 it is set to Charge Only mode:
 
 Jun 12 15:11:17 tethys kernel: umass0: BBB reset failed, IOERROR
 Jun 12 15:11:17 tethys kernel: umass0: BBB bulk-in clear stall failed, IOERROR
 Jun 12 15:11:17 tethys kernel: umass0: BBB bulk-out clear stall failed, IOERROR
 
 I was wondering since this PR is 6 months old if any progress had been
 made on it?
 
 Sincerely,
 
 Rusty Nejdl
 
 http://networking.ringofsaturn.com
